upasargachandrika.example_text: 'pra samrAjaM carzaRInAmindraM stotA navyaM gIrBiH' (f॰8.16.1) praSabdaH prakarze
'tA vAmadya stutiBiH SuBaspatI aSvinA prastuvImahi' (f॰8.22.6) ukto'rTaH
'praRamya sa kaTayituM prAstAvIt' (harza॰7) prAstAvIt=upAkraMsta ArabDa prapUrvaH stOtiH prAramBe vartate iti (Bawwi॰2.28) ityatra jayamaNgalA idaM ca loke prAyeReti drazwavyam
'prastUyatAM vivAdavastu' (mAla॰1) ukto'rTaH
'rAjYo'pi durgaRAn vakti pratyakzamaviSaNkitaH sa vaktA guRatulyAMstAnna prastOti kadAcana' (Sukra॰2.323) anarTakaH praSabdaH stOtItyevArTaH stutimAtre'BiprAyo na tu stutiviSeze
'yatrAlokapaTAvatAriRi ratiM prastOti netrotsavaH' (mahA॰ca॰2.45) prastOti janayatItyarTAntaram
'sa tu prastAvayajYezu kAM pradAsyati dakziRAm' (paYcata॰2.176) prastAvaH saMvAdaH yatra vaktAraH svasvamatopanyAsenopakurvanti
'nAmamAtraprastAvaH' (SA॰7) prastAvaH kIrtanam uddeSaH atra stOtirviSezaM parihatya sAmAnye kIrtane'rTe prayuktaH
'lokezu paYcaviDaM sAmopAsIta pfTivI hiNkAro'gniH prastAvaH' (CAM॰u॰2.2.1) sAmna AdyAni padAnyupodGAtarUpARi prastAvo Bavati
'tvarAprastAvo'yaM na Kalu parihAsasya vizayaH' (mAlatI॰9.45) prastAvo'vasaraH
'saMskArABinayO tezAM prastAvAnAM ca DAraRam (hari॰2.93.10) prastAvaH kriyARAM prasaYjanam
'yaTepsitaM prastutaM karma Darmyam' (Bawwi॰2.28) prastutaM prArabDam
'yadidaM prastutaM karma tvayA govinda lOkikam' (hari॰2.4.36) ukto'rTaH
'nalinyAM prastutA krIqA BavatA BoginAmiti' (bf॰Slo॰sa॰5.113)
'udgITaH prastutaM stutam' (aTarva॰11.7.5) prastotrA gIyamAnaH prastAvAKyo BAgaH prastutam prastUyate stuteH prAramBaH kriyate'neneti prastutam
'prastAvanA kapawanAwakasya' (kA॰Sukra॰) avataraRikA
kftamanenAprastutapraSaMsayA asambadDArTakaTanena nArTa ityAha
'notsahante mahAtmAno hyAtmAnamapastotum' (paYca॰1) apastotum ityapapAWo BAti upastotumiti tu yujyate upapUrvasya zwuYo bahulaM prayogaSCandasi
'aTApi mitro varuRena saMstUyate' (ni0 7310) saha stUyate ityarTaH
'te brahmasaMstutAH' (Apa0 Da0 11132) saMstutAH=kIrtitAH - 'DAvati paScAdasaMstutaM cetaH' (SA0 133) asaMstutamananuroDi visaMvAdi
'saMstutAnAcazwe' (kA0 SrO0 556) saMstutAH saMgatAH (jArAH)
'nEyamikaM hyetad fRasaMstutam' (Apa0 Da0 111) ityatra DUrtasvAmyudDftaM vasizWavacanam)
'anekaSaH saMstutamapyanalpA navaM navaM prItiraho karoti' (SiSu0 331) saMstutaH=paricitaH
'jayanti mahatAM saMstutApalApinyaH kalyARinyo nItayaH' (mAlatI0 1023) saMstutam=aBipretam vivakzitam
'na vaSaM yozito yAnti na dAnErna ca saMstavEH' (paYcata0 489) saMstavaH=stutiH
'guRAH priyatveDikftA na saMstavaH' (ki0 425) saMstavaH paricayaH
'navErguREH samprati saMstavasTiraM tirohitaM prema DanAgamaSriyaH' (ki0 425) saMstavaH paricayaH ukto'rTaH
'kAmaM nEtat praSaMsanti santaH svabalasaMstavam' (BA0 u0 16834) saMstavaH=stutiH
'SlakzRErvAkyEH saMstavasaMprayuktEH' (BA0 mahApra0 317)
'tamimaM jYAnavfdDaH san gopaM saMstotumicCasi' (BA0 saBA0 416) saMstotum=stutam
'sa saMstAvaH kratuzu yA stutiBUmirdvijanmanAm' (amara:)
'aTAsya saMstavikA devA indraH somo varuRaH parjanya fBavaH' (ni0 784) samAnaH sADAraRaH stavaH saMstavaH
'na tvfk saMstavikI daSatayIzu vidyate' (ni0 7820)
'te SmaSAnasaMstutAH' (satyA0 SrO0 26138) SmaSAnamiti kIrtitAH tattulyA ityarTaH
'cakAra samudrasenanAmnA sA vaRijA saha saMstavam' (kaTA0 29101).. saMstavaH paricayaH
'prArabDavAn maheSAnaM parizwotumudAraDIH' (skanda pu0 kA0 49555) parizwotumaBizwotum
'mahI devasya savituH parizwutiH' (tE0 saM0 1213) paririti mahItyanena gatArTaH
